name: Bunker Collective Plugins
description: Private plugin marketplace for Bunker Collective — skills, agents, and workflow automation tools.

plugins.name: Paperclip Brief Builder
plugins.description: Dialogues with the operator to extract a vision, success criteria, and constraints, then produces a structured handoff brief formatted for the Paperclip CEO agent. Reusable pattern for any agentic platform with a documented input spec.
plugins.author: Bunker Collective

plugins.name: GTM Outbound Engine
plugins.description: Three-skill pipeline for building ICPs, generating qualified lead lists, and writing persona-matched cold copy. Supports Notion or local storage. Works with Tavily, Exa, or Supadata search agents.
plugins.author: Bunker Collective
